title: Kindergarten Teachers, Except Special Education
description: Teach academic and social skills to kindergarten students.

tasks.text: Establish and enforce rules for behavior and policies and procedures to maintain order among students.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare children for later grades by encouraging them to explore learning opportunities and to persevere with challenging tasks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Instruct students individually and in groups, adapting teaching methods to meet students' varying needs and interests.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Teach basic skills, such as color, shape, number and letter recognition, personal hygiene, and social skills.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Demonstrate activities to children.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Read books to entire classes or to small groups.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Guide and counsel students with adjustment or academic problems or special academic interests.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Observe and evaluate children's performance, behavior, social development, and physical health.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide a variety of materials and resources for children to explore, manipulate, and use, both in learning activities and in imaginative play.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare and implement remedial programs for students requiring extra help.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Identify children showing signs of emotional, developmental, or health-related problems and discuss them with supervisors, parents or guardians, and child development specialists.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain accurate and complete student records and prepare reports on children and activities as required by laws, district policies, and administrative regulations.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Establish clear objectives for all lessons, units, and projects and communicate those objectives to children.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan and conduct activities for a balanced program of instruction, demonstration, and work time that provides students with opportunities to observe, question, and investigate.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with parents or guardians, other teachers, counselors, and administrators to resolve students' behavioral and academic problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Organize and lead activities designed to promote physical, mental, and social development, such as games, arts and crafts, music, and storytelling.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Meet with parents and guardians to discuss their children's progress and to determine their priorities for their children and their resource needs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Use computers, audio-visual aids, and other equipment and materials to supplement presentations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Meet with other professionals to discuss individual students' needs and progress.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Instruct and monitor students in the use and care of equipment and materials to prevent injuries and damage.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Prepare objectives and outlines for courses of study, following curriculum guidelines or requirements of states and schools.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assimilate arriving children to the school environment by greeting them, helping them remove outerwear, and selecting activities of interest to them.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collaborate with other teachers and administrators in the development, evaluation, and revision of kindergarten programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare materials, classrooms, and other indoor and outdoor spaces to facilitate creative play, learning and motor-skill activities, and safety.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare, administer, and grade tests and assignments to evaluate children's progress.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Confer with other staff members to plan and schedule lessons promoting learning, following approved curricula.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Organize and label materials and display children's work in a manner appropriate for their sizes and perceptual skills.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare for assigned classes and show written evidence of preparation upon request of immediate supervisors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plan and supervise class projects, field trips, visits by guests, or other experiential activities and guide students in learning from those activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Supervise, evaluate, and plan assignments for teacher assistants and volunteers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Involve parent volunteers and older students in children's activities to facilitate involvement in focused, complex play.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Administer standardized ability and achievement tests and interpret results to determine children's developmental levels and needs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Attend professional meetings, educational conferences, and teacher training workshops to maintain and improve professional competence.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Attend staff meetings and serve on committees as required.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Select, store, order, issue, and inventory classroom equipment, materials, and supplies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform administrative duties, such as assisting in school libraries, hall and cafeteria monitoring, and bus loading and unloading.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Provide students with disabilities with assistive devices, supportive technology, and assistance accessing facilities, such as restrooms.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
